Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Weenie's 'collecting' becomes an issue in 'Weenie's Trailer Trash', then in 'Close Encounters of the Nutty Kind', The Camp is gripped by alien paranoia and fear.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience in 'Patnocchio', then in 'ChefBob', SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona when Mr. Krabs puts in an open kitchen.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while in 'Plankton Paranoia', then in 'Library Cards', Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the world of books.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Tales of the Ninja Turtles
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Donatello enters a creepy lab to save Wingnut, but things take a monstrous turn.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Nine finally sees the error of his ways, but it's too late for an easy clean up. Saving the Shatterverse now will require an unthinkable sacrifice, but Sonic is determined.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Coach Dobkins challenges Miss Smith to a baseball game in 'The C Team', then in 'Father Daughter Dance', The Chipettes each want Dave to be their date for the dance.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Alvin packs a whole summer into one just day in 'Last Days of Summer', and in 'The Littlest Robot', Simon invents a robot with emotions and an ability to learn which quickly backfires.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Boog accepts a dangerous fishing challenge in 'Fish Out of Water', then in 'Mukluk', Elliot finds a creature he believes to be good luck.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward to steal the Krabby Patty formula in 'Sweet and Sour Squidward', and then in 'The Googly Artiste', Patrick's painted rocks with googly eyes are an artistic hit.
